codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully centralizes verification gating by adding check_records to the canonical work show bundle, updating supervisor guidance to keep checks evidence-only (never marking work done based on checks alone), clarifying 'work verify' as audit-only, and adding comprehensive test coverage across service, CLI, and E2E layers. All verification steps passed including manual validation with a live serve instance and browser testing.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The control-plane-worker skill is not exposed through the Skill tool for mission workers, requiring workers to read .factory/skills/control-plane-worker/SKILL.md directly instead of invoking it as a tool.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.deviations shows followedProcedure: false with reason 'The bootstrap required invoking `control-plane-worker`, but that skill was not exposed through the Skill tool in this worker session.' Worker suggested: 'Expose `control-plane-worker` through the Skill tool for mission workers, or update the bootstrap to tell workers to read `.factory/skills/control-plane-worker/SKILL.md` directly when the tool entry is unavailable.'

summary: PASS: Feature fully implements the canonical review bundle contract. Key changes: (1) Added check_records field to service.Work()/WorkShowResult and populated it via store.ListCheckRecords() so one work show call exposes all evidence without separate discovery flows. (2) Updated supervisorRolePrompt() and supervisorDispatchProtocol() to direct reviewers to work_show for the canonical evidence bundle and explicitly state 'A passing check is evidence only. NEVER call work update <id> --execution-state done just because a check passed.' (3) Clarified 'work verify' help text as 'Audit the recorded work graph and artifact chain' with explicit note 'This verify surface is for cryptographic/audit validation only. It does not act as the completion-review bundle and it does not change work state.' (4) Extended test coverage with TestWorkShowIncludesCanonicalReviewBundle (service), TestWorkVerifyCommandHasAuditOnlyDescription (CLI), and enhanced TestWorkLifecycleCommands (E2E) to start a temporary serve instance and assert passing checks keep work in 'checking' state until attestation resolves. Manual validation confirmed CLI/HTTP bundle reads both include check_records/attestations/artifacts/docs and work remains blocked with unresolved attestations even after passing checks. No blocking issues found.
